'''Toshan Gant''' was an inventor and manufacturer of [[Droid/Legends|droid]] security breakers which came into widespread use in the era of the [[Jedi Civil War]]. Private efforts, presumably stemming from the questionable legality of his products, led to Gant's imprisonment at some point in his career; afterward, Gant continued his research in affiliation with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] military. He went on to create the [[Security Domination Interface]].<ref name="KOTOR" />
